reviews.review_description: Despite being in development the app already has one of the best DLNA and SMB implementations. It has good compatibility with video nad sound formats too (flat, 3D, VR, DTS sound). And its free (!). Having it in library is no brainer.

reviews.review_title: Let you do Youtube videos Full screen
reviews.review_description: This app isn't what it measures up to doesn't let you do full screen videos on Youtube

developer_response.body:
Hello, can you please provide more details of the issue to our support at support@commedia.app 
We are more then happy to fix the issue if you help us track it down.

reviews.review_description: I'm super impressed with this app - the player is smooth, responsive, intuitive to use and lovely to look at. What kinks there are are minor and I look forward to further use and progress of development! Good work developer(s), keep it up!
Idt

Excellent vr player.But a little mistake

 in settings,screen setting option is not present.plz set the option, rest are ok.I write again about screen settings,I would like to say about scree distance..that I can set screen close if required and far also..Now it is more better and immersive. Thanks the team ..

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for the review! If you need anything else, let us know ;)

reviews.review_description:
I've been using it for about 8-9 months and it's great for playing 2D and 3D content locally or from a network share. 

Multiple users had an issue with an update and the dev team fixed it in a couple of days. This gives me the confidence that the project is in good hands.
Great
Its easy to use. I,m so glad.
Bueno

reviews.review_title: It is free and nearly perfect
reviews.review_description: I was looking for a player to watch movies from my NAS. and i'm glad i found it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Feel free to tell us what features will make it better, we prioritize features based on the input from our users.

reviews.review_description: I am so happy this app exists

developer_response.body: And we are so happy to have such a nice review, much love.

Excellent features especially the move the screen
 button.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review!

The preview thumbnails are on the roadmap.

reviews.review_description: Nice i like it
Today it stopped working. Even after reinstall it crash at start.

developer_response.body: The fix has been deployed on production build, enjoy.

reviews.review_description: Klass

developer_response.body: Vielen Dank für die Bewertung! Zögern Sie nicht, uns mitzuteilen, was wir verbessern könnten. Wir entwickeln den Player basierend auf den Bedürfnissen unserer Community, daher ist uns jedes Feedback willkommen.

reviews.review_description: great editing

Application is the best for watching from SMB.
And most of the codecs are supported that is great!

Thank you
Theres no "exit" button! And none of the buttons on the controllers let you exit either! please add a way to leave lol

developer_response.body: Hello, we have a section for it in our docs, it is also the intended way to close an app by Meta: https://docs.commedia.app/fundamentals/ux-design#exit-commedia

reviews.review_description: grrattt

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review!

reviews.review_title: Good, but lacks a few features
reviews.review_description: This is a good app, quite simple player to play videos with. Just wished we had a better menu on launch and also thumbnails for videos. Right now, all videos are shown as blank squares in the browser.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for the review! 
We plan to add thumbnails soon.
Regarding the menu on launch, it will make more sense when we add the possibility to edit the buttons position and adding your own shortcuts to folders, local network locations, websites...

reviews.review_description: Great app, simple interface, very easy to use, love it~

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! If you have any wishes or need help with anything you can chat with us on Discord at: commedia.app/discord

reviews.review_description: Just wish it has a video favorite feature but other than that love that it shows everything without issue

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Content management, like favoriting, is planned.

reviews.review_description: Nice media player! But I noticed some issues when using SMB to watch videos — it sometimes lags and the frame rate drops. Also, it would be great if there’s a feature to save video settings, so I don’t need to adjust them every time.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thank you for the review, if you want us to help with SMB issues, please contact our support at support@commedia.app or come chat live with us on commedia.app/discord
Regrading the video settings, they are saved for each video as long as you have few kilobytes of space on your device. If you meant default settings, then it is on our roadmap.

reviews.review_description: nice😀👌

developer_response.body: Thanks ;)

reviews.review_description: this is definitely an up and coming app

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! If you have any wishes or need help with anything - you are welcome to join our Discord at: commedia.app/discord

reviews.review_title: Great VR player with lots of potential.
reviews.review_description: This App has a good interface and stable playback already. It's still in beta but we all can see the great potential for this app. The Devs are super active and responsive in Discord. I wish them great success!
This is great,, just wish they implemented the curved screen display for 2d screens,, subtitles are coming soon that is also great news

Finally a video player for Oculus that doesn't crash all the time. This thing is stable and performant. Works great on SMB networks too.
Nice!

developer_response.body: Hey Jim, thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: Its got the beginnings of a good media app, ive used almost, if not all the paid main ones and id say this one can easily be at the same level, but lord they need to add button mapping/screen presets

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for the review. The project is only one year old, we have a lot of catching up to do. We will be adding button mapping for sure, but what do you mean by screen presets? You can reach us on www.commedia.app/discord or support@commedia.app

reviews.review_description: Nothing

developer_response.body: Hello, can you please contact us at support@commedia.app, we would be glad to help you with the issue. You can also reach us on our Discord channel: commedia.app/discord

reviews.review_description: I love your message. I was about to buy a different program but decided to donate the money to this program instead. Can you please add the function to play iso files.
Lightweight and works great with everything I throw in it, very easy to align the POV. Absolutely recommended!!!

Works well and it's free!

For 5 star we need:
usb support
auto format detection
a few environments
photos and mvc video support :)
vr180 youtube support
multiplayer
Already has some great features and getting better every day!

There was a bug where Commedia couldn't properly list contents with Jellyfin DLNA server. I reported it, and it got fixed the very next day. Now I could access my movie library. But there was no sound. Commedia didn't support Atmos codec. The very next day, it was fixed. But there was no audio track selection. I wrote a review mentioning it, and the very next day, it was fixed. I think you can see the pattern here.

Commedia may not have some features you want or some creature comforts. But, the thing is, it only doesn't have them *yet*. And the devs are *dedicated* to fixing every issue and adding every feature. They are actually the best.
Excelent design and funkcionality!
i love this app. My go-to media player. Very excited for the browser update.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you so much! You can already test the browser in the latest Beta build ;)

https://docs.commedia.app/beta/commedia-v0.3.0

reviews.review_title: Best free video player on Quest
reviews.review_description: Quest desperately needed a good video player available for anyone to use and this is it - thank you Commedia!
Great media player with easy controls and a sleek design. Also the developer is really responsive to feedback and keeps making great updates!
So far a pretty good App, just waiting for the subtitle support.

developer_response.body:
Hey, good news, subtitles are now live in v0.3.2 
Let us know how it works!
